nodes.title: villain
nodes.body: Villain is loose-passive (VPIP 63%, PFR 24%) and folds to hero flop c-bets 8/17 times (47%). River aggression shows up in 4/100 hands (4%). Villain has won 38 of 50 showdowns.

nodes.title: Frequent preflop 3-bettor

nodes.title: Folds to river bets
